sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(date AS DATE)) AS month, SUM(amount) AS household_payment_outflow FROM trans WHERE k_symbol='SIPO' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) IN (1997,1998) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1; WITH baseline AS (SELECT account_id, AVG(monthly_amount) AS avg_1996_monthly_sipo FROM (SELECT account_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(date AS DATE)) AS month, SUM(amount) AS monthly_amount FROM trans WHERE k_symbol='SIPO' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE))=1996 GROUP BY 1,2) x GROUP BY account_id), current_months AS (SELECT account_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(date AS DATE)) AS month, SUM(amount) AS monthly_amount FROM trans WHERE k_symbol='SIPO' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(date AS DATE)) IN (1997,1998) GROUP BY 1,2) SELECT c.account_id, c.month, c.monthly_amount, b.avg_1996_monthly_sipo, c.monthly_amount / NULLIF(b.avg_1996_monthly_sipo,0) AS ratio_to_1996_baseline FROM current_months c JOIN baseline b ON b.account_id=c.account_id WHERE c.monthly_amount > 2*b.avg_1996_monthly_sipo ORDER BY ratio_to_1996_baseline DESC; SELECT d.A3 AS region, SUM(t.amount) AS household_payment_volume FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE t.k_symbol='SIPO' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE)) IN (1997,1998) GROUP BY d.A3 ORDER BY household_payment_volume DESC;

chart_spec.layout_intent: Risk-monitoring dashboard with trend on top, exception table as the main operational panel, and regional volume bar to the side.
